name: agent_compare
description: Compare 2-5 ACP agents side-by-side. Input: agent_ids (comma-separated names or IDs). Output: comparison table as JSON array with fields per agent: name, isOnline, successRate, completedJobs, uniqueBuyers, offeringCount, priceRange, token. Plus a winner_summary. Use cases: pick the best agent for a task, benchmark competitors, A2A hiring pipeline, agent selection. Triggers: compare agents, agent comparison, which agent is better, benchmark agents, agent vs agent.

agentIds.description: Comma-separated agent names or IDs to compare (2-5 agents)
